event: October Revolution: Bolsheviks seize power
Repudiation of Tsarist state debts
Brest-Litovsk: Russia exits WW1
Czechoslovak Legion revolt opens the Volga front
Allied intervention: landings at Archangel
Kolchak proclaimed Supreme Ruler at Omsk
WW1 armistice frees Allied resources; Black Sea opened
Kolchak spring offensive toward the Volga
Red counter-offensive against Kolchak begins
Denikin takes Tsaritsyn; Moscow Directive (3 Jul)
Denikin takes Odessa & Kiev
Denikin takes Orel - closest approach to Moscow
Yudenich reaches the outskirts of Petrograd
Red counterblows: Orel retaken; Yudenich repulsed
Omsk falls; Kolchak's army disintegrates
Kolchak abdicates (shot 7 Feb)
Novorossiysk evacuation: Denikin's army broken
Polish offensive takes Kiev (Soviet-Polish war)
Miracle on the Vistula: Poles rout Red Army at Warsaw
Wrangel evacuates Crimea: organized White resistance ends
Peace of Riga; Kronstadt rebellion crushed
Genoa conference & Rapallo treaty (debt-settlement hopes dashed)
